task_name: Add Phase Scanner Missing Required Input Fixture
goal: Add a Phase Scanner fixture for missing required input fields and update the coverage map without changing scanner runtime behavior.
claims: BP-037 adds a missing-required-input reject fixture.
BP-037 updates the coverage map so the new fixture is visible and checked.
BP-037 does not change Phase Scanner runtime behavior or external integration behavior.
assumptions: Existing runtime behavior already rejects missing required input fields.
The coverage map must be updated in the same block because BP-036 enforces it.
dod: Missing-required-input fixture exists and is tested.
Coverage map lists the new fixture and no longer lists missing required fields as an uncovered gap.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-035 documented missing required fields as a fixture gap, and BP-036 made coverage-map registration mandatory.
